name: Sangre Del Diablo Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 Enrico's spaghetti sauce (28-oz. jars) or any prepared spaghetti sauce
10 Pounds Pinto beans, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onions and garlic in oil until onions are translucent.
2. Add all remaining ingredients and stir over low heat until TVP is soft and flavors have blended, about 30 minutes to 1 hour.
3. Serve and enjoy!
